summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Creative Studio new features including file upload, Kling AI Avatar, Motion Control, and Voice Cloning. Backend APIs are functional with proper authentication. Frontend pages load correctly with working tab navigation and FileUpload components.

minor_issues.issue: CORS headers not properly returned in OPTIONS requests
minor_issues.impact: May cause issues with browser preflight requests in some scenarios

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health)
Backend root endpoint (/api/)
Backend API structure and routing
Authentication with test session token works
File upload endpoint POST /api/generate/upload accessible (expects file)
Avatar endpoint POST /api/generate/video/avatar accessible (expects form data)
Motion control endpoint POST /api/generate/video/motion-control accessible (expects form data)
Voice clone endpoint POST /api/generate/voice/clone accessible (expects form data)
Cloned voices list endpoint GET /api/generate/voice/cloned works
VideoGeneration page loads with authentication
VideoGeneration page has 3 tabs: Text/Image, Avatar, Motion Control
VideoGeneration tabs navigation works correctly
VoiceGeneration page loads with authentication
VoiceGeneration page has 2 tabs: Text to Speech, Voice Cloning
VoiceGeneration tabs navigation works correctly
FileUpload components render correctly (2 upload elements found)
Sidebar navigation works for Video and Voice pages
Dashboard navigation to Video and Voice pages works
Authentication flow redirects correctly to Emergent Auth
Protected routes require authentication

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All key features working - tabs, navigation, FileUpload components)
